question: For all of the 4 cylinder cars, which model has the most horsepower?
gold_sql: SELECT T1.Model FROM CAR_NAMES AS T1 JOIN CARS_DATA AS T2 ON T1.MakeId  =  T2.Id WHERE T2.Cylinders  =  4 ORDER BY T2.horsepower DESC LIMIT 1;
predicted_sql: SELECT T2.attr_20f35e FROM cars_data AS T1 JOIN car_names AS T2 ON T1.key = T2.attr_66aece WHERE T1.attr_fd0c4a = 4 ORDER BY T1.attr_65e1c7 DESC LIMIT 1;
raw_response: SELECT T2.attr_20f35e FROM cars_data AS T1 JOIN car_names AS T2 ON T1.key = T2.attr_66aece WHERE T1.attr_fd0c4a = 4 ORDER BY T1.attr_65e1c7 DESC LIMIT 1;
